name: Uncharted Space - project 3062
short_description: In this game, you are a leader, leading a force of army to fight other forces in the deep spaces. You will plunder their resources, build your homelands, explore and expand, managing your army both strategically and tactically. This will be a saga written with blood and fire.
detailed_description:
Explore the depths of space, establish settlements, mine diverse resources, develop your economy, build fleets, and conquer the stars.

Features:

тАЛтАЛAutomated Turn-Based Strategy: Focus on critical decisions while the game handles tedious processes through its automated turn-based system.

тАЛMulti-Fleet Exploration: Dispatch multiple fleets for automated exploration to uncover hidden wonders in the cosmic void.

тАЛReal-Time Tactical CombatтАЛтАЛ: Command fleets against formidable foes in real-time battles, with options to pause, accelerate, or decelerate combat for strategic planning.

тАЛSquad-Based WarfareтАЛтАЛ: Organize warships into specialized squads with distinct roles. Achieve victory through strategic positioning, tactical formation setups, and surprise maneuvers.

Players can interact with structures on the map. By allocating human resources, constructing warships, engaging in trade, executing missions, and other methods, they can accumulate strength and build up their forces.

The developers describe how their game uses AI Generated Content like this:

To better focus on the core design of the game, some of our portraits and scene, were produced through a process involving drafts by artists, AI-assisted rendering, and adjustments by artists. Moreover, to ensure the final artistic presentation, all AI-generated assets have been manually refined by the artists.
